hero.title: Local Services Finder
hero.description: Maintain a private directory of trusted local service providers with contact details, categories, ratings, notes, and preferred markers.

flow.title: Save → Filter → Contact
steps: Add known providers with contact and address details
Mark preferred providers, record ratings, archive stale records, and review dashboard metrics

differences.title: A private directory, not a public search engine
differences.description: Local Services Finder stores information entered by the user. It does not provide maps, GPS, live search, booking, marketplace matching, or public reviews.

items.title: Capture trusted providers
items.description: Store business name, contact person, phone, email, website, address, city, area, notes, rating, and last contacted date.

items.title: Mark preferred providers
items.description: Preferred state and personal ratings help users remember who they trust.

items.title: Keep stale records out of the way
items.description: Archive and restore providers without changing the app into a marketplace.

feel.title: Personal and practical
feel.description: The workflow favors quick lookup and private memory over public discovery complexity.

items.title: Easy to scan
items.description: Category, preferred state, rating, phone, and area appear directly in the list.

items.title: Private
items.description: Notes and ratings are user-entered and owner-scoped.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No Google Maps, Yelp-style reviews, booking, routes, GPS, or third-party directory APIs.

audiences.title: Who uses Local Services Finder
audiences.description: Local Services Finder is useful for people who want to remember providers they already know.

items.title: Households
items.description: Track electricians, plumbers, cleaners, salons, pharmacies, doctors, and tutors.

items.title: New residents
items.description: Build a personal directory of useful local contacts.

items.title: Small-business users
items.description: Save suppliers, accountants, lawyers, couriers, print shops, and maintenance providers.

resourceSection.title: Directory essentials
resourceSection.description: A focused workspace for private provider memory.

items.title: Providers
items.description: Create, edit, delete, prefer, unprefer, archive, restore, search, filter, and paginate provider records.

items.title: Categories
items.description: Create and manage simple user-owned service categories with color and sort order.

items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Review active providers, preferred providers, archived providers, recently contacted providers, and categories.

groupedSection.title: From category setup to provider lookup
groupedSection.description: The app supports a simple loop from setup to daily retrieval.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Group providers such as Electrician, Plumber, Doctor, Pharmacy, Salon, Car Repair, Tutor, Lawyer, Accountant, and Other.

items.name: Contact details
items.description: Capture phone, alternate phone, email, website, address, city, area, notes, rating, and last contacted date.

items.name: List
items.description: Search and filter by category, preferred state, archived state, rating, and last contacted range.

items.name: Detail
items.description: Review one provider and update preferred/archive state safely.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Local Services Finder uses the shared shell, generated contracts, isolated backend ownership, and shared UI patterns.
items: Protected routes inside the persistent Ansiversa shell.
Isolated local services database and owner-scoped APIs.
Shared drawer forms, confirmation dialogs, pagination, feedback, and empty states.
